title: ProjectAddMethod
description: Contract for project.add JSON-RPC method. Persists a project folder; idempotent by normalized absolute path.

ProjectAddRequest.title: ProjectAddRequest
ProjectAddRequest.description: Params for project.add. Path must be absolute; obtained from dialog.openProjectFolder before calling.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path of the project folder chosen by the user

ProjectAddResponse.title: ProjectAddResponse
ProjectAddResponse.description: Result of project.add. Errors: validation_error (1001) if path is not absolute, does not exist, or is not a directory; database_error (1004) on persistence failure.

name.description: Project display name derived from the folder name
